task_description: Read train.csv and test.csv using pandas, train a simple logistic regression model on the training data, and output predictions for 'Transported' to a file named 'results.csv' in the output folder. To provide clear progress tracking during execution, print explicit checkpoint statements at each phase (e.g., 'Starting preprocessing...', 'Training model...', 'Evaluating model...', 'Generating predictions...', 'Saving results...', 'Validation checks passed!').
data_prompt: Train data at /home/gem/workspace/data/train.csv with label 'Transported'. Test data at /home/gem/workspace/data/test.csv. Predict on the test set and output predictions matching sample submission column formats.
user_input: Run baseline pandas prediction with checkpoint prints.
tool_prompt: Use pandas and scikit-learn to make baseline predictions with clear print checkpoints.
